heading: Definition
label: 70301 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7030136:2213., , .Jan. 8, 1983Pub. L. 97–427, § 1496 Stat. 2267The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
